# Digital Credit Yield

> Independent tracker for STRC, SATA and BMNP — preferred stocks issued by Bitcoin and Ethereum treasury companies. Live prices, dividend history, income projectors, effective-yield charts and capital-flow data. For information purposes only. Not financial advice.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/): Overview of STRC, SATA and BMNP with live prices and current yields.
- [STRC Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc): Full hub for STRC (Strategy Perpetual Preferred Stock, 11.50% annual rate, semi-monthly cash dividends, Nasdaq).
- [SATA Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata): Full hub for SATA (Strive Perpetual Preferred Equity, 13.00% annual rate, daily cash dividends, Nasdaq).
- [BMNP Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/bmnp): Full hub for BMNP (Bitmine Immersion Technologies Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock, 9.50% fixed rate, weekly cash dividends, NYSE).
- [Money Flow](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/money-flow): Weekly capital raised by STRC, SATA and BMNP from SEC 8-K filings since each IPO.
- [Blog](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog): Articles on STRC, SATA, BMNP, preferred stock investing, and dividend strategies.

## Tools

Each tool covers STRC, SATA and BMNP via an in-page selector; add `?stock=strc` (or `sata`/`bmnp`) to open a specific instrument.

- [Live Price & Effective-Yield Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/chart): Live market price against $100 par and the effective yield it implies.
- [Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/projector): Model income and portfolio growth, with or without dividend reinvestment.
- [vs Treasuries](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/vs-treasuries): Compare the dividend income against US Treasuries and bank savings.
- [Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/dividends): Every recorded dividend payment with per-share amounts, record and payment dates.

## Reference

- [FAQ](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/faq): How to buy, whether dividends are guaranteed, why the price stays near par, tax basics.
- [Understanding the Risks](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/risks): Board discretion over dividends, rate changes, crypto-collateral volatility, liquidity, perpetual structure.
- [Glossary](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/glossary): Plain definitions of par value, effective yield, perpetual preferred stock, VWAP, staking, redemption premium and more.

- [Strategy's Capital Structure: From Senior Debt to Common Stock — and Where STRC Fits](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/strategy-capital-structure)
- [Strive's Capital Structure: What Debt-Free Means for SATA](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/strive-capital-structure)

- [STRC Goes Semi-Monthly and SATA Goes Daily: What Changes and When](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/strc-sata-dividend-frequency-changes-june-2026)
- [Two Roads to a Bitcoin Bank: How Metaplanet's Model Differs from Strategy's](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/two-roads-to-a-bitcoin-bank)
- [A Storm in a Teacup](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/storm-in-a-teacup)

- [About](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/about): About Digital Credit Yield and its author, Robin Gillingham.

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/privacy-policy): How Digital Credit Yield handles data and cookies.
